snippet.title: The Stunning History of AmerisourceBergen
snippet.description:
In this video, we'll take a look at the stunning history of AmerisourceBergen. From its humble beginnings in the 1970s to today, we'll see how AmerisourceBergen has played a pivotal role in the pharmaceutical industry.

Whether you're a pharmacist, healthcare professional, or just curious about the pharmaceutical industry, this video is a great way to learn about AmerisourceBergen and its impact on the world!

snippet.title: The Connells - '74-'75 (Official HD Music Video)
snippet.description:
Here is the official version of the classic music video for The Connells' international hit single '74-'75.

The song nostalgically reflects on the passing of time and how people change across decades. The music video, directed by Mark Pellington, features students from Needham B. Broughton High School's Class of 1975 and compares the photographs from their yearbook, with how they look and have aged since then.

The track comes from the band's breakthrough release Ring (1993), whose 30th anniversary is being celebrated in 2023 by Craft Recordings, with the album's first widely available vinyl reissue, and bonus-filled CD and Digital Deluxe Editions.

ORDER / STREAM HERE: https://found.ee/connells-ring

The deluxe editions of the album have been newly remastered by Brent Lambert at Carrboro, NC’s The Kitchen, and include 21 bonus tracks, including rare B-sides and 12 previously unreleased demos. Rounding out the packages are new liner notes by the Raleigh-based journalist and author David Menconi, featuring new interviews with the band.

Subscribe to The Connells' YouTube channel: https://found.ee/NuFvr

#theconnells

snippet.title: Wine Down Friday with Steve Sanghi, Executive Chairman - Microchip
snippet.description: Steve Sanghi was named the Executive Chair in March of 2021.  He served as Chief Executive Officer of Microchip since October 1991, and the Chairman of the Board of Directors since October 1993. Sanghi served as President from August 1990 to February 2016 and has served as a director since August 1990. Before joining the Company, Sanghi was Vice President of Operations at Waferscale Integration, Inc., a semiconductor company, from 1988 to 1990. Sanghi was employed by Intel Corporation from 1978 to 1988, where he held various positions in management and engineering, the most recent serving as General Manager of Programmable Memory Operations. Sanghi holds a Master of Science degree in Electrical and Computer Engineering from the University of Massachusetts and a Bachelor of Science degree in Electronics and Communication from Punjab University, India.

Sanghi holds a Master of Science degree in Electrical and Computer Engineering from the University of Massachusetts and a Bachelor of Science degree in Electronics and Communication from Punjab University, India.

snippet.title: [How To] Analyze Investor Deck - Cencora (NYSE: COR) Preliminary Stock Analysis
snippet.description:
Help Support the Channel
10% Off for Koyfin - Affordable Alternative to Bloomberg Terminal: https://shorturl.at/cksWY

Cencora (NYSE: COR), formerly AmerisourceBergen, is a global healthcare solutions leader driving innovative partnerships with global manufacturers, providers, and pharmacies to improve product access and efficiency throughout the healthcare supply chain.

They provide drug distribution and consulting related to medical business operations and patient services. They also distribute a line of brand name and generic pharmaceuticals, over-the-counter (OTC) health care products and home health care supplies and equipment to health care providers throughout the United States, including acute care hospitals and health systems, independent and chain retail pharmacies, mail-order facilities, physicians, clinics and other alternate site facilities, as well as nursing and assisted living centers. They also provide pharmaceuticals and pharmacy services to long-term care, workers' compensation and specialty drug patients.

Cencora handles about 20% of all of the pharmaceuticals sold and distributed throughout the United States and ranked 10th on the Fortune 500 list for 2020 with over $179 billion in annual revenue.

Disclaimer:
The content in this video is provided for educational and informational purposes only. It is not intended as, and shall not be construed or relied upon as, financial advice or recommendations. 

Investing in financial markets involves risk, and individuals should always conduct their own research, seek professional guidance, and carefully consider their financial circumstances before making any investment decisions. The views, opinions, and analysis presented in this video are solely those of the content creator and are not endorsed by or representative of any specific financial institution or organization.

All investments come with inherent risks, and past performance is not indicative of future results. The content in this video should not be considered a substitute for professional financial advice or a complete evaluation of an individual's investment goals and risk tolerance.

Viewers are encouraged to consult with a qualified financial advisor or other relevant professionals to discuss their unique financial situation and investment needs. Any action taken by viewers based on the information in this video is done at their own risk.

snippet.title: Heart at Work: Edwin Helps Minority Businesses Succeed
snippet.description:
As part of CVS Health's Supplier Diversity team, Edwin Alvarez leads an effort to ensure that minority and women-owned businesses have equal opportunities. As someone who has owned his own business, Edwin understands more than most the struggle diverse businesses face. 

Thank you, Edwin, for being a committed champion for diverse suppliers. #CVSHeartAtWork https://www.cvshealth.com/news/heart-at-work/heart-at-work-edwin-alvarez.html

snippet.title: How to Pronounce Cencora
snippet.description:
Welcome! Here you will hear How to Pronounce Cencora i.e. the “correct” pronunciation.
Learn the MOST Difficult Words in the world: https://www.youtube.com/@YouTubeJulien/videos

Let me know in the comments how YOU say this word/name. We all have different ways of pronouncing things, and it’s always good to share with the community and exchange opinions of phonetics.

My name is Julien (French for “Julian”), a well-travelled Frenchman, biology and wine expert. I am a  fluent speaker of different European languages such as French, English, Spanish, and Italian, but also a curious student of world idioms such as German, Chinese, Japanese, Portuguese, Polish, or Russian. This channel is dedicated to sharing my knowledge and helping others saying words and names, if not perfectly ‘correctly’, but at least better.

If you enjoy a human voice making pronunciation videos and you’d like to support my work, you can join this channel to support and get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCYsWqViUNFkLaXKNR9clGLQ/join 

For ASMR with my Voice: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ae1N_J1PMIA 

If you’re interested in pronunciation, you can check out these “TOP WORDS” playlists:
- Luxury & Fashion Brand Names: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gyd8foV6deQ&list=PLd_ydU7Boqa2w8P-ZZrfVYWs3qBsdMn4B 
- Food names: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LgWzNLNMDl0&list=PLd_ydU7Boqa0wR76Ht9GpFcmvH-bgkaq7 
- French Pronunciation: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k8tn9MZtoZY&list=PLd_ydU7Boqa13EfZvpz24SveHrcsGQzdh 
- Italian Pronunciation: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=giNzHWkIVEI&list=PLd_ydU7Boqa03CI1RRUb2p5I29yw-lKHU
- Spanish Tutorials: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9fxmhqXfpmc&list=PLd_ydU7Boqa31uiH2Z6JlsDqr-QsQrMAQ
- Most Difficult English words: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KwOZl3D4YaQ&list=PLd_ydU7Boqa2EA2tN4vC4Z-i9EWrMMUsa
- British UK Vs. American US: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AMH__PZeujQ&list=PLd_ydU7Boqa13GiouLiETyJtjxcgY06V9
- Complete Wine Pronunciation Guide: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IxBncfGXcnE&list=PLd_ydU7Boqa1H3n3P2UGS5B8T3MWvGE2q 
- Mexican Vocabulary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m47792oAnLs&list=PLd_ydU7Boqa3yb-qCcrB_8LCQvlGUkjeO

If you’ve read this far, thank you for your kindness and positivity! JM

You can skip the intro through the time stamps below:
00:00 - Pronunciation Intro
00:15 - How to Pronounce Cencora

I also make ‘dictionary’ videos about the Meaning and Definition of English expressions (What does this mean?): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kj1dQSkP7IM&list=PLd_ydU7Boqa3ifiySvT_O5HaZ6apUIlca
